name: Breadcrumb
description: Hierarchical page path with separator characters.

api.name: Breadcrumb
api.description: Hierarchical page path with separator characters.

examples.title: With Icons
examples.code:
<Breadcrumb>
    <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbLink Href="#">
                <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Home)" class="h-4 w-4" />
            </BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbLink Href="#">Documents</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbLink Href="#">Projects</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator />
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbPage>Report.pdf</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
    </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>

examples.title: Custom Separator
examples.code:
<Breadcrumb>
    <BreadcrumbList>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbLink Href="#">Home</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Slash)" class="h-4 w-4" />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbLink Href="#">Settings</BreadcrumbLink>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
        <BreadcrumbSeparator>
            <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Slash)" class="h-4 w-4" />
        </BreadcrumbSeparator>
        <BreadcrumbItem>
            <BreadcrumbPage>Profile</BreadcrumbPage>
        </BreadcrumbItem>
    </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>

mdSummary:
# Breadcrumb

Hierarchical page path with separator characters.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/breadcrumb

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Breadcrumb | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Breadcrumb | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Breadcrumb | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbEllipsis | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbEllipsis | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbLink | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbLink | Href | `string?` | `"#"` |  |
| BreadcrumbLink | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbLink | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbPage | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbPage | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbPage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbSeparator | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbSeparator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BreadcrumbSeparator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Breadcrumb) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (BreadcrumbItem) — RenderFragment slot

- `ChildContent` (BreadcrumbPage) — RenderFragment slot
